title: danthonia semiannularis var. unarede
intro: Danthonia semiannularis var. unarede is a type of grass native to Australia, also known as blue grass, which belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits like reducing stress and promoting a good night's sleep, as well as being used to treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Danthonia semiannularis var. unarede include teas and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
